_comment: These are the brand colors and fonts. Changing a value here changes it everywhere on the site. After editing, rebuild the site for changes to take effect.

fonts.displayNote: Used for all headers, the wordmark, and section titles. This is a self-hosted font in public/fonts/Wonderia.otf.
fonts.bodyNote: Used for all body text, prices, labels, and UI elements. Loaded from Google Fonts.
